metadata.title:
PRIZE-W WINNING
FRUIT HERE TO


co TO CHICAGO

pages.raw_text:
Official announcement was made
by the trustees of the National
Apple Show, Inc, this morning that
the prize-winning fruit at the third
annual exposition in Spokane, next
November, and district and general
displays from the commercial apple
belts in Washington, Oregon, Idaho
and Montana, will be sent to Chi
cago for exploitation purposes in
the First Regiment armory during
the week of the International Live
stock exhibition.


The Chicago plan involves an ex-
penditure of $4,000 exclusive or
the cost of the Spokane show,
which is estimated at $4,000. A
band of national reputation will be
engaged to present programs or
concert and promenade music, and
the show will be advertised In cir
Gus style in a territory containing
more than 3O,OOO,O0O population.


Tour by Rem Rice.


Rem H. Rice, secretary and man.
ager of the apple show, Is arrang-
ing for a tour of Montana and
Southern Idaho to interest fruit
growers there in the Chicago show.
He has already visited many of the
principal apple districts in Wash
ington, Oregon and Idaho, where
he says, the prospects were never
better for enormous yields of fruit.
